title: Glowy Vents
description: A Glowroot add-on that implements an unused texture in a cool way! Made in MCreator.
body:
Created for the Voxelprint Glowroot Modjam!

This mod is a [Glowroot](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowroot) add-on that implements an unused texture in a cool way! 

It adds a new vent block that teleports the player through it and puts them into crawl mode. There is also a one-way version, as well as a version that requires redstone power.

![The 3 Varients](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YrqzAIxl/images/f112ff03e40f4755267621607df7f521ec36a4d1.png)

Permission to use textures was granted by the original autor.

**Please report any bugs/suggestions on the Discord.**

_Made with MCreator - Go check it out!_

_Feel free to use this in your modpack! I'd prefer credit in a link to this mod page._

_I do not permit anyone to reupload this mod onto any other website without my permission. Please report any project not following this guideline._
